title: MyHMCTS: How to issue and manage a money claim online
body: "You can use MyHMCTS to issue a claim for any amount against either a represented or an unrepresented defendant.   The claim must:   be for a specified amount of money not be one that would normally follow part 8 of the civil procedure rules  be issued in English   A legal representative of the defendant can then use MyHMCTS to respond to the claim. The defendant’s legal representative must be registered with MyHMCTS before you issue the claim.  If there is one unrepresented defendant, they can respond to an issued claim online. If there are 2 or more unrepresented defendants, the case will continue offline and must be progressed on paper.  For more information on the civil money claims service, see:   the make a court claim for money guide practice direction 51R of the civil procedure rules  "
